titleStmt.title: SII 23.128: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 128. (A.R. No. 128 of 1907.) Pāppāṉkuḷam, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Siddhajñānēśvara temple—on the south wall of the first prākāra Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara: year 8

summary.p: This belongs to the 8th year of the same king, and seems to be connected with the sale transaction mentioned in No. 127 above, as it records the receipt (nāṭṭu) by the same assembly for the amount of mortgage paid by them to the two mortgagees out of the sale amount of 928 paṇam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravarttikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 8vatu muḷḷi
nāṭṭu ceraṉaiveṉṟāṉ tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Uṭaiyār karuttaṟintu muṭi
kkaṟkuṟicciyāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyanallūr Ūṟkuccamainta Ūrava rom
ṟku caṇḍeśvaravilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta Ulakuyyavantapaṉmaṉ kuḷappaṟṟuk
camattappiṟāṟtikaḷ Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavukkum Emmilicaintu vilai niṟ ceyitta
vāṇarāyaṟkum cūlapāṇippiḷḷaikkum Oṟṟiolaippaṭikkuk kuṭuppitta ṭṭa 100 6 10- m Eṅkaḷperil Eṭṭāvatu kārvarai ci kaik
ppaṭi paṇattukkuc celavāka Eṅkaḷ Ūṟkukkūṟu ceykiṟa Irāmāṇṭār vacam vāṅkikkuṭutta ṭṭa7 100 6 10 8- m Āka ṭṭa9 100
Irupattueṭṭu Innāyaṉār koyilukkut taṉmakattāvaṉa nāyaṉār kāṅ keyar karuvukolakkāvaln nampipakka
ṭuppittup poruṭcelavākac cāttip poruṭcelavu nāṭṭukkuṭutom Āti caṇḍecuratevaṟkuk kaṟkuṟic
lūr Ūrkkuccamainta Ūravarom Ivai vikkiramaciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai naraciṅkapaṉmaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāya
ṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irāciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kumaraṉ te
Ivai kūttāṭuntevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai civallapappallavaraiyaṉ taṟ kuṟikku Ivai kūttāṭun
tevaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
